entry.title: Re: Task 10 - The power of CDL with as-select (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
Hello DJ,

very interesting command, didn´t know that,

But:

I am Working on a Win11 System with  Docker-Desktop 4.32.0

cds repl remains on v 7.9.3

also "docker system prune" didn´t help 

.... nevertheless - that's the way it is

kind regards, Matthias

----- Dockerfile: --------------------

# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1

ARG VARIANT="20"
FROM mcr.microsoft.com/vscode/devcontainers/javascript-node:0-${VARIANT}
ARG CAPVER="latest"

# Install some generally useful tools
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get -y install --no-install-recommends \
    curl git sqlite3 entr source-highlight

# Install SAP CAP SDK globally
USER node
RUN npm install -g @Sap/cds-dk@$CAPVER

# vi mode everywhere and nicer prompt KTHXBAI
RUN cat <<EOBASHRC >> /home/node/.bashrc
export EDITOR=vi
set -o vi
bind -x '"\C-l": clear'
EOBASHRC

RUN echo 'export PS1=${PS1/\$ /\\\\n$ }' >> /home/node/.bashrc

# Ready!
WORKDIR /home/node
 
----------- devcontainer.json ---------------------
{
    "name": "Basic CAP devcontainer definition",
    "build": {
        "dockerfile": "Dockerfile",
        "args": {
            "VARIANT": "20"
        }
    },
    "customizations": {
        "vscode": {
            "extensions": [
                "sapse.vscode-cds",
                "dbaeumer.vscode-eslint",
                "humao.rest-client",
                "qwtel.sqlite-viewer",
                "mechatroner.rainbow-csv"
            ]
        }
    },
    "forwardPorts": [
        4004
    ],
    "remoteUser": "node"
}

entry.title: Two SAP CodeJam events to be held in Tbilisi!
entry.content:
Are you ready for the future of business computing? #EPAMGeorgia is thrilled to host a series of offline events organized by SAP — SAP Code Jam, where the latest SAP tools - SAP Build and SAP Cloud Application Programming will be introduced.

SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code - Sept. 16th (9:00 - 16:30)
Get hands-on experience with SAP Build, guided by SAP Developer Advocates, Daniel Wroblewski & Shrinivasan Neelamegam. This session is perfect for all interested in SAP, regardless of their level of expertise. Build your business app & process, understand navigation, triggering processes, implementing mobile capabilities, and so much more! 

RSVP:  SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Tbilisi, Georgia) 

SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud - Sept. 18th (9:00 - 16:30)
For any experienced SAP developer, we will explore how to combine SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud. Daniel and Shrinivasan will guide you through creating full-stack applications, deploying and configuring with easy-to-follow steps. 

RSVP:  SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud (Tbilisi, Georgia)  

These interactive, hands-on sessions will be led by experienced SAP Developer Advocates Daniel Wroblewski and Shrinivasan Neelamegam. Join us at EPAM Georgia office, InOffice Building, 10 Bidzina Kvernadze St, Tbilisi, #Georgia.

Don’t miss out - Confirm your spot now! Please note that the language of instruction for these events is English. See you there!

#SAP #SAPCodeJam #SAPBuild #SAPHANACloud #BusinessApp

entry.title: Re: Valuation type addition to material in-OMS2
entry.content:
Hello Mate,

I hope you are referring valuation type to Q/V updating otherwise it is different config (split valuation) to activate Valuation type in material master.
 
OMS2 is used to create new material type where in Quantity / Value updating is case specific.
ROH- By valuation area - Valuated materials.
NLAG- In no valuation area - Non valuated materials.

Try copy as functionality copying SAP standard Material Types for new creation.

also try changing Quantity / Value updating for existing material types after clearing the at least these prerequisites.
a. clear stock to null in both current and past periods.
b. closing all financial documents end to end like PO,SO.

Beware, OMS2 impacts MM-FI integration you have to change valuation classes of all impacted materials.

Thank you
Regards,
Prasad Baraskar.

entry.title: QA32 - Adding Repository Code
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to add the repository code to the place marked in the picture.
Is there an adaptation?

entry.title: Costing Based ADSO
entry.content:
Hello All,

could you please help me to create the costing based ADSO.

Source fieds

GL Account Company Code Fiscal year val1 val2 val3 val4 etc

Target required

GL Account Fiscal year company code fiscal year period amount

here based on the GL Account, company code, fiscal year we need to pick the fiscal year period 

then

if period 001 we need to pick the value  from value1 and store to Amount

if period 002 we need to pick the value  from value2 and store to Amount

So one. 

 

Thanks and Regards,

VenkatC

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
My name is Adham Diab, and I am 30 years old from Egypt.

I have been involved with SAP for the past year and am eager to pursue a career in SAP project manager. I would be extremely grateful if you could provide me with an opportunity to take the certification exam. This certification would greatly enhance my career prospects.

Thank you for considering my request.

entry.title: 🇩🇪 Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA (Stuttgart, DE)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python. You do not need to have any background in the topic, but a lot of curiosity!

You'll become acquainted with how embedded Machine Learning in SAP HANA can be used to build ML models. In working through this CodeJam you'll also become familiar with how the SAP Business Application Studio can be used to work with Jupyter notebooks.

This is a free in-person event and is planned for Friday, September 13th in Stuttgart, Germany 🇩🇪 from 10:00 to 16:00 CEST (UTC+2). The language of the event and the content will be in English. The instructor is a Developer Advocate Vitaliy Rudnytskiy.

Every attendee must complete essential prerequisites before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/hana-ml-py-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md.

The event is being hosted by Bosch Digital at
Bosch IT-Campus, Building No 701, Room no G0.06
Borsigstrasse 4
70469 Stuttgart-Feuerbach, Germany

Note that spaces are limited: we can only accommodate 25 attendees.

Visit the SAP CodeJam group for more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees.

entry.title: Re: How should the correct definition of "Range&quot...
entry.content: Thank you 🙂

entry.title: Re: M-series Apple Chip MacBooks and Abap Platform Trial containers using Docker and Podman
entry.content:
Hi @julieplummer20 ,

yep, my hunch is that Apple changed something in their Virtualisation Framework in the spring, and since then neither Docker Desktop nor Podman Desktop and their underlying Engines are able to run SAP CDT instance. However the still existing Apple QEMU Framework is able to do this task, and that is why there is still a way for Apple M-series MacBook users to get SAP CDT working ok.

My plan is to check the situation after new versions of macOS are released, as that is the time when updates to Apple Virtualisation Framework are delivered, to see whether the updated Virtualisation Framework can be used with the Docker Desktop or Podman Desktop for a (faster than QEMU) runtime of SAP CDT.

I was thinking, if ARM-based Windows laptops become popular as they may well do in the coming years, will SAP CDT be runnable on those... and if not, would SAP be interested in making an arm-architecture image of SAP CDT... you can Julie always let me know if you want volunteers for participating in such a project 🙂

Regards, dylan

entry.title: Re: How should the correct definition of "Range&quot...
entry.content: thank you 🙂

entry.title: Re: Filter on Account Dimension in SAC Model or Story
entry.content:
Hi William_Yu

I'm trying to apply a filter on the property of my account dimension but i get an error in the table:

Warnings
Server Warning (2)
Invalid filter : Invalid filter, flat filters on attributes of the account dimension are not supported ([VDB.TIPBDG].[VDB.TIPBDG]). Query result may not be as expected.
Invalid filter : Invalid filter, flat filters on attributes of the account dimension are not supported ([VDB.CDR].[VDB.CDR]). Query result may not be as expected.

"VDB" is the account's name, "TIPBDG" and "CDR" are the properties i need to filter in my table

entry.title: Re: Task 10 - The power of CDL with as-select (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content: Nice - there should be no reason why you can't force a rebuild without cache, even on a Windows machine.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA technical replacement for FK01 BDC Create Ven...
entry.content:
Hi Markus,

If you 'just' need to enhance existing suppliers by copying existing company code relevant data to a new company code, then I also think that class CL_MD_BP_MAINTAIN is a good place to start.
SAP note also describes a possible solution which include that class:
2417298 - Integration of Business Partner with Customer and Supplier Roles - SAP for Me

But if you need to be able to provide input for the company code relevant data on the individual suppliers, I think you should try to look at Fiori app 'Manage Mass Maintenance' (Fiori ID F1047A). It can be used for mass maintenance of business partners. 

BR,
Gitte.

entry.title: SAP Marketing Cloud - Introducing Our Summer '24 Release 🌞
entry.content:
We are excited to unveil the latest enhancements in our SAP Marketing Cloud summer ’24 release! 🌞

In this blog, we’ll showcase exciting new features, but don’t miss the comprehensive list on the What’s New in SAP Marketing Cloud release page.

Let's dive into the highlights. 🚀🔍

 

Spam Protection with Friendly Captcha

For an additional captcha provider, besides Google Captcha, we are now partnering with Friendly Captcha, with a “Bring your own license type” of integration. It is straightforward to use when you design your landing page. In the Form editor, a Captcha element is provided to set up captchas for your forms.

 

Figure 1: SAP Marketing Cloud's Form Editor - In the design of the form, you can add a Captcha element and define its attributes.

 

Let’s have a look at the video that our partner provided to give you more insight.

 

Video 1: Friendly Captcha

For more information, see

  • Enhancing Form Security with Friendly Captcha | Application Help 
  • Information in Friendly Capcha 

 

Additional Segmentation Attributes in Group Account Sales Data for Segmentation Object Contacts

Additional amount fields have been added to the segmentation object for Contacts. Now, you can see the sales data from the interactions and use them for segmentation.

Figure 2: Amount attributes in the standard segmentation content. 

For more information, see Amount Attributes | Administration Guide 

 

Double Opt-in and Opt-out Performance Improvement for Inbound Interaction

The double opt-in and double opt-out process is improved by speeding up the inbound interaction handling.

For more information, see Double Opt-In or Opt-Out Process | Application Help 

 

Bot Click Filtering

Use the Bot click filtering to identify interactions that originate from bots compared to CLICK_THROUGH interactions that come from a human being.

SAP Marketing Cloud can reduce the impact of bot clicks. We are not guaranteeing that every bot click is filtered out.

Note that after enabling the feature, you may see a significant decrease in the click-through rate.

 

Watch this video to get more insight.

 

Video 2: Bot Click Filtering.

For more information, see

  • Clicking Links in Emails and Opening Emails | Application Help 
  • Campaigns: Convert BOT_CLICK Interactions to CLICK_THROUGH Interactions | Administration Guide

 

Provide more Transparency on System Health: Check Your Marketing Solution

Review the health checks in the Check Your Marketing Solution app, to obtain information about housekeeping tasks to perform that can optimize your system performance. The health check Checking the Usage of Easy Unsubscribe for Email have been added, as Yahoo and Google enforced the easy unsubscribed.

For more information, see System Health Checks | Administration Guide and SAP Note 3426234.

 

If you have provided easy unsubscribe for all marketing emails that you are sending, you can pause the health check.

Pausing is also available for some other health checks, for example to allow time to correct a situation. During the pause period, no notifications are sent. But with a new release upgrade, the pause is reset, and you get all health checks again.

For more information, see Pausing System Health Checks | Administration Guide 

 

Deduplication

Deduplication is in the SAP Marketing Cloud system for quite some time. In some cases, households or contacts may use the same email address for multiple individuals. The goal is to send only one email with the personalization of the “best” contact, which could be the one with a certain attribute, for example the highest loyalty tier, or the one with most interactions.

Have a look at this video that explains how you can deal with this, it also answers the customer influence request 212731.

 

Video 3: Deduplication

 

Company Logo

Exchange very easily the SAP logo with a customer logo through the parameter COMPANY_LOGO_URL in the Manage Launchpad Settings app. You can upload a file with a company logo, and it will replace the SAP logo for all users, to all themes.

Figure 3: The standard SAP logo image can be replaced with a customer logo.

For more information, see Manage Launchpad Settings | Administration Guide 

 

Heads Up – Replacement of SAP Fiori launchpad home page (Outdated) by Spaces and Pages / Final Removal

With the upgrade to SAP Marketing Cloud 2408 (August 17/18, 2024), and as part of the already announced transition to Spaces and Pages, SAP will change the launchpad settings for Spaces and Pages to Spaces only in your production systems. The change will be irreversible. This means there will be no option to switch back to Groups or to activate the toggling option between Spaces and Pages, and Groups anymore. See Note 2970113.

 

You can take advantage of the new features immediately:

  • Watch the SAP Marketing Cloud | What’s New 2408 webcast to learn more about new product updates with insight from SAP Marketing Cloud experts.
  • Go in-depth on every feature update on the What’s New in SAP Marketing Cloud release page.
  • Get all product details on the SAP Marketing Cloud 2408 product page which is generally available now.
  • Check Out our latest SAP Marketing Cloud Email videos.
  • Stay up to date and sign up for the monthly SAP Marketing Cloud and SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement News.
  • For more information, use this link to the Release Navigator.

Connect with other customers and product experts in the https://community.sap.com/topics/marketing-cloud to get your questions answered.

entry.title: Custom Field in Item Overview in ME21N, ME22N
entry.content:
Hello,

i already achieved to add a Custom Field to the item overview.
Via Append Structure in MEPO1211, MODIFY the Tablecontroll and pass a Metadata Field to the new Field.

But now my Problem:
When i enter a value to the Field and hit Enter, the Field gets cleared. I guess it is because the value is not saved to the EKPO. How can i achieve, that my Custom Field get saved in EKPO.
I added the Field with exact same Name and element to the append structure CI_EKPODB in EKPO.


In long term the value of this field should be written in a condition 'ZEKM' (Customer wants to set the Value in the TableControl to save time not changing the condition in the item condition tab). I am not exactly clear how to achieve this aswell.

Hope someone can help me.

Kind Regards
Julian

entry.title: Using Sales Orders as Cost Objects in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

In S/4HANA Public Cloud, can we use a sales order and a sales order item as cost objects in general journal entries to record expenses related to the sales order? I tried to post primary costs by specifying a sales order and a sales order item in general journal entries, but it didn’t work.

We want to manage the profitability of sales orders by including not only the cost of goods sold but also related expenses. In this case, do we need to create projects or WBS elements to record these expenses?

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: The best way to subscribe to SAP Build Apps is through a BTP Booster
entry.content:
What is the recommended way to subscribe to SAP Build Apps ?

Most SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) users are familiar with the process of subscribing to BTP services through the BTP Cockpit. However, a subscription to SAP Build Apps is not as easy as it sounds. Besides adding the required entitlements to the tenant, it also requires setting up a Custom IdP (IAS), and much more ! 

For subscribing to SAP Build Apps, please do not use the Service Marketplace, unless you want to configure everything yourself manually and troubleshoot anything you've missed.


BTP Booster

A booster can automate the setup and onboarding of a service. This would obviously include the subscription to the service you want to start using, but also takes care of the prerequisites. A booster can configure entitlements according to service plans available in a specified region, subscribe to various dependent services, configure BTP destinations, and set up the required authentication mechanism.

Where can you find the SAP Build Apps booster ?

Users who have the Global Account Administrator role, will be able to see the booster in the BTP Cockpit of the global account and execute it. If you don't have this role, you'll need to contact to person in your organisation who manages the SAP global account.

To make the search for the correct booster a bit easier, you can use the search function. When you search for Build Apps, you will see 2 tiles (!).

For setting up SAP Build Apps, please use the booster called "Get started with SAP Build Apps - Detailed Account Setup".

Before we continue, let me briefly explain why there is another booster. End of last year we've introduced a new way of onboarding through Quick account setup with SAP Discovery Center and Terraform. The booster called "Get started with SAP Build Apps - Quick Account Setup" is part of this initiative. We are currently working on further improvements of the onboarding experience, and will soon replace this booster with an onboarding experience more seamlessly integrated with SAP Discovery Center. Once this goes Live (in the coming months), this second booster will be removed from the booster catalog.

Using the SAP Build Apps booster

Select the booster called "Get started with SAP Build Apps - Detailed Account Setup". This will open the overview page.

In the components tab, you will see which services and subscriptions are handled by the booster. As you can see, subscribing to SAP Build Apps also requires Cloud Foundry Runtime, SAP Mobile Services, Cloud Identity Services and SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition.

Let's start the booster by selecting the Start button.

Prerequisites

The first step consists of checking the prerequisites. The booster will be checking whether have the correct authorizations to execute the booster. It will also check whether the BTP global account has the required entitlements. And last but surely not least, it is checking whether a Custom Identity Provider is available on the global account.

If all checks are passed, you can move on to the next step.

Important note for users who unsubscribed from SAP Build Apps

Customers who used Visual Cloud Function (VCF) backends need to wait at least 15 minutes after unsubscribing from SAP Build Apps, before they can subscribe the service again. The current booster will not provide this error information and simply fail.

Scenario

Here, you can select the scenario or subaccount mode. You will either create a new subaccount, or apply the booster to an existing subaccount.

Warning: selecting an existing subaccount might impact the way your user(s) authenticate with already subscribed applications in an existing subaccount. A good example here is SAP Business Application Studio. If you have already created dev spaces in SAP Business Application Studio, then these dev space are associated with your default SAP user. Once you switch to authentication through Custom IdP, your user will be different. As such, you will no longer have access to the mentioned dev spaces (until your switch back IdP).

Assuming we create a new subaccount, we select the first option and move on to the next step.

Configuration

In the configuration page you can change the subaccount to your needs and select the service plans you need. The region selection is based on the availability of the service entitlements in the regions. Only regions that offer all listed service entitlements can be selected.

 
After configuring, we move on to the next step.

Adding users

In this step you can add users (email addresses) and select the Identity Provider for platform users as well as application users. For the latter, we will be using IAS. If your account does not have a Custom IdP yet, it will be created. The required Role Collections will be assigned to the users based on the category Administrators and Developers.

Review

The last step before executing the booster is to review the selected configurations.

Selecting Finish will start the booster.

Execute booster

All required configuration steps are automated and where possible will run in parallel.

Especially the Establishing Trust, Creating and Assigning Role Collections and mapping them to a user group are troublesome to handle manually.


Result

Upon successful execution of the booster, you will be presented with a link to navigate to the subaccount.

Once in the subaccount's cockpit, you will find the SAP Build Apps service link, which leads you to the SAP Build Lobby, where you can start working with SAP Build Apps. Your user(s) have access to this out-of-the-box.

 

Conclusion

Subscribing to SAP Build Apps requires more than just adding the service entitlement and subscribing to it. Please use the BTP Booster for SAP Build Apps which automates all the steps for you.

Happy "no-coding" with SAP Build Apps !

entry.title: Re: MRP run should be allowed only if sales order costing...
entry.content:
Hi Thangaraj,
thanks for raising the question. There is a possibility to prevent the requirement handover to MRP by setting the 'Fixed Date and Qty' flag on the order item level. When entering MTO items the confirmation is usually zero as you have no supply yet. By fixing date and quantity the request is set equal to the confirmation, and hence the there is no requirement that can be handed over to MRP. Once you have completed sales order costing, you can unset the flag and the item is visible to MRP again as the there is open quantity.

 

You can set this indicator via different ways:
1. You can set it on the schedule line view of item detail


2. You can set it from within Review Availability Check Result screen


3. You can set it by default for a sales area via SSCUI Configure Default Settings by Sales Area (106305)

Regards,
Andreas

entry.content: hi @JuanCarlosDelga,

entry.title: RCM: Disposition codes in Recruiting
entry.content:
Hello, from our US Recruiting we received the requirement of adding Disposition codes in to RCM (due to reporting needs). We were informed this could be achieved by adding them into the candidate pipeline. At the moment, we have one global candidate pipeline. Some of the codes are quite US specific. I am wondering if anyone had similar requirement and with having global reach including US preference. How did you approach this?

Did you implement a US specific pipeline? or you harmonized it into one pipeline with accommodating the needs of US?

Thank you for any recommendation.

entry.title: Re: Absence half day, leave request half day with start t...
entry.content:
@ROTCHA : Yes, we plan enhancements for better usability to request half day leaves in first half 2025. Please stay tuned and watch our release information sessions. However, due to the fact that this is not yet build there is of course no guarantee. But this topic is high on our agenda.

Best regards

Volker

entry.title: Error when synchronizing to incumbent of one position in Manage position, but not in Manage data
entry.content:
An error occurred while synchronizing the changes to the incumbent of position (x). Neither the position nor the incumbent have been updated. Detailed error: No event reason or event found for user (x).

System shows this error when we try to change higher level position from certain future date in Manage position. (Manage position - insert new record - change higher level position)

When we make the same change in Manage data (Manage data - position - insert new record - change Higher level position) system accepts the change and it creates new record on the position and also on Job Information portlet (Supervisor change).

This happens only on one position in the system. We managed to change 10 other positions, from manage position, added them the same higher level position and it changed their supervisor accordingly in Job Info portlet.

There seems to be an issue with this position, or use

entry.title: Re: digital manufacturing - Standard Value Key
entry.content:
Hi,

Standard Value Keys (SVKs) are defined in PP at Work Center level, see Standard Value.

Br,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: Integration of Sales Scheduling Agreements with TM embedded in SAP S/4HANA - Use Cases and Docum
entry.content:
Good day, Michael,

 

Great post and information shared. I would like to ask you for which SAP version this integration works in a standard path? 

If I want only to integrate outbound delivery generated using Sales Schedule Agreement, is it possible? 

 

Thank you,

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to skip damaged files in SAP PI file adapter?
entry.content: File adapter isn't responsible for inspecting content. If you are trying to skip files then you can use the options to move files to an error folder during processing.

entry.title: Duplicate error messages in Fiori Elements
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I got an issue with the message handling in a Fiori Elements app. In the Edit mode, I am changing the root entity as well as some sub-entities (loaded via navigation). The changes are triggering a $batch request to the backend.

The backend itself is a SEGW project. In the /IWBEP/IF_MGW_APPL_SRV_RUNTIME~CHANGESET_PROCESS method I raise a single exception with a message:

…
lo_message_container->add_message_from_bapi( is_bapi_message =<ls_message>).
…
RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE /iwbep/cx_mgw_busi_exception
  EXPORTING
    message_container = lo_message_container.

However, on the UI side, an error message is shown for each request entity:

Question, is there a way to reduce this to a single message? For example, if the root entity is locked by another user, it doesn’t really make sense to display the same message multiple times.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: How to split files dynamically in SAP CPI?
entry.content: You'd have to make use of the CamelSplitIndex. As for the splitting you cannot mix something you define statically (receivers) with an unknown dynamic quantity (splits).

Regards
Marcio Blos

entry.title: Re: Analysis and Recommended Settings of the Security Audit Log (SM19 / RSAU_CONFIG, SM20 / RSAU_REA
entry.content:
Hello @Frank_Buchholz 

I hope you're doing well! I've found your blog incredibly helpful multiple times, especially when setting up security logs in the ABAP system. It's been a great resource, so thank you!

I'm currently working on developing a parser to convert data from the SAP security audit file into a format that’s easier to understand. With the latest release version 7.52, we are utilizing the RSAU_READ_LOG transaction to display or view log data. I've managed to parse about 60% of the data successfully based on this.

However, I'm now stuck with the remaining part of the audit log structure. By any chance, do you have information about the latest audit log structure similar to what you posted for the previous version? Any insights on how to group this data would be immensely appreciated.

Looking forward to hearing from you

Thank you in advance

Regards
Deva

entry.title: Re: Missing decimals with MOVE-CORRESPONDING of CURR type
entry.content: Please check program attributes: fixed point arithmetics.

entry.title: Re: Project System Auto Carry Forward Issue
entry.content:
It seems a system error. SAP should not accept a journal entry in fiscal year 2025 if there is no budget. This is  the standard behavior. Try running a database reorganization through t-codes CJEN and CJBN.

Regards
Marcio Blos

entry.title: Re: Custom Field in Item Overview in ME21N, ME22N
entry.content:

i tried this. I still can't save the data i entered in ME22N. I can fill the Field with value now. But only with Data from a Table for exmaple. But not with the Value i entered in ME22N.

I hope you get what i mean.

entry.title: Re: Not able to open smartforms & sfp tcode in sap abap i...
entry.content:
Get a VM that runs Windows because they are not supported on a Mac (I have to do the same).

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: How to export with more info of all Custom Code Transactions
entry.content:
Hi,

Can we export all Custom Code Transactions from SAP ECC for a business, including the business name it belongs to and the last time it was used in that specific business? I currently have an export file with three columns: Transaction Code, Transaction Description, and Program only. However, this is not sufficient to identify details such as when specific custom code was used and by whom.

I am looking for your guidance on this matter.

Thank you.

BR.

entry.title: Re: Costing Based ADSO
entry.content:
May be could be please check below scanrios for better understanding.

I required 2 ADSO one is actuals and another one for plan (in plan ADSO fields are GL Account, Company code, Fiscal year and keyfigures are val1 val2 valu3 like 12)

for Actual ADSO i dont have any problem but plan ADSO i have GL account, Company code, Fiscal year

I need to show the report like below

in CP i will create the join like Actual.GL = Plan. GL and Actual.Company code = Plant. Company code

variable screen : Fiscal year period 001.2024 Company Code 001 Then report like shown

GL Account comapny Acual Value Plan Valu

123 001                      5000             100 (if it has the value1)

if we select fiscal year period 001.2024 to 002.2024 then

GL Account comapny Acual Value Plan Valu

123              001         5000           300 (Val1 100 + value 200) if value is not there for valu2 it will show only 100)

Could you please check these one and help me.

entry.title: Re: Missing decimals with MOVE-CORRESPONDING of CURR type
entry.content:
@Andreas-145 

Thank you for your effort. I'm really appreciate for intention to help me. But especially for preceding comments about fixed point arithmetics i made a P.S. in the end of the post.

It was the first thing I've checked. And I have already found the reason of the problem. It was Fields Inconsistent with the runtime object in ztable2 as it described in https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1248769

Thank you anyway.

entry.title: Re: Acquiring Core ABAP Skills - example files can not reached
entry.content:
Thank you @Mate_Pal

I hope you'll have a favorable outcome to this matter as quick as possible.
I will open a ticket too.

Jean

entry.title: Re: Costing Based ADSO
entry.content: Hello All, To create the costing-based ADSO, use the following steps: Define source fields (GL Account, Company Code, Fiscal Year, val1, val2, etc.) and target fields (GL Account, Fiscal Year, Company Code, Fiscal Year Period, Amount). In the transformation, map the GL Account, Company Code, and Fiscal Year to determine the Fiscal Year Period, then assign the corresponding value (val1 for period 001, val2 for period 002, etc.) to the Amount field. Implement this logic to populate the target fields based on the specified periods and values. https://thebestoncosurgeon.com/

entry.title: Re: Analysis and Recommended Settings of the Security Audit Log (SM19 / RSAU_CONFIG, SM20 / RSAU_REA
entry.content: @devaprakashbuda See the description of this new format in my answer: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/re-hey-team-can-i-know-how-to-see-the-security-events-l/...

You can easily update drivers as well as install the new version. If your drivers are not working properly or have been fully removed, don’t worry, you can easily resolve all the problems with this tool. Now there is no need to find out your required drivers on the internet. You can easily detect the latest version of drivers in a minimum amount of time and install them. With a few simple clicks, it can detect and install more than 1 million popular drivers. It makes uninstalling any unwanted driver easier.

In addition, Driver Easy Professional Torrent offers you many functions. For example, examine video playback cards, screens, cumbersome discs, community cards, sound cards, and more. It is a skilled device on your computer. It manages all the driving forces associated with the points on your computer. It helps you a lot. It is the best application to update. You must download it. It is full of all kinds of professional tools. Driver Easy Free is the best application for all users. It is a very famous software to easily update all types of drivers. You can easily understand it and work with it. As you know, units are very important to run your system in the best way.

Download Now

entry.title: Re: copied absence issue
entry.content:
Your first step should be to look in the Time Evaluation results (t-code = PT_CLSTB2) for the employee who has that new Absence, to see what were the results for that day in Tables ZES, ZL and AB.  If you can't find the double entry (Old Absence + New Absence) in any of these Tables, the problem should be in Payroll Processing.

Next, to debug your problem, run Time Evaluation for that employee, in "Test" mode and with the "Display Log" box checked,  retroactively from the day of that absence up to the day of the absence.

Then, drill down into that log to identify where that double entry happens (time type, custom pcr, etc...)

If the problem appears to be in Payroll Processing, execute a Payroll Simulation for that employee, with the "Display Log" box checked and drill down into that Log to identify the source of the double entry.

entry.title: transferring Inbound Delivery from ERP S4 to EWM we are getting error
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

 

While transferring inbound  delivery from ERP S4 to EWM we are getting below errors.

 Could not create header data delivery 0180000004, system S4D_XXX   /SCWM/ERPINTEGRATION 12 018XXXXX

 Error during mapping: material 000000000010000002 does not exist 

/SCWM/ERPINTEGRATION 88 0180XXXXXX

Cannot create item 000010 of delivery 01800XXXXXX  from system S4D_XXX   /SCWM/ERPINTEGRATION 13 0180000004 10

 Could not determine EWM stock data for: Storage Location 1201 ZROD /SCWM/ERPINTEGRATION 112 01800XXXX 10

 

Please help in solving this error.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Project WBS element budget exceeded - Message no. BP603
entry.content:
I noticed that accounts 207001 and 207006 do not have a cost element. Even if you make postings to these accounts against a WBS element, they will be ignored by availability control and PS reports.

Should these accounts have a cost element?

Should these accounts be posted against the WBS elements?

Regards
Marcio Blos

entry.title: Re: Change the language of EWA reports in SAP for Me
entry.content: Only as a Word document, the EarlyWatch Alert report is available in Japanese in the Service Message App in SAP for Me.

entry.title: Re: Org structure in MM
entry.content:
Hello @2831990 

I still can't see any benefits from the additional plant especially that you won't have inventory for projects. The additional plan will make the system setup more complex without any advantages.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - build service not working since 24 hours
entry.content: Hello @liardo , I noticed the same issue as @chandan3009 with runtime 4.11.132, AB version 2.12.0

entry.title: Re: transferring Inbound Delivery from ERP S4 to EWM we a...
entry.content:
Hello @Santosh_Kumbhar 

The error message

Error during mapping: material 000000000010000002 does not exist

indicates that the material is not transferred from S/4 to EWM.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: transferring Inbound Delivery from ERP S4 to EWM we a...
entry.content: Hello Dominik, Material is transferred as a product in SAP EWM .

entry.title: Re: Status code=”412” text= “Precondition Failed”>Error:P...
entry.content: In general, this error to the supplier as the buyer would have enabled the rule "Requires suppliers to create an order confirmation before creating a ship notice". It means, the supplier has to create the order confirmation first for the line item and then they should create the shipment.

entry.title: Re: transferring Inbound Delivery from ERP S4 to EWM we a...
entry.content: @Dominik

entry.title: Re: While implement OData using spring boot 3.0.1 , getting 500 while calling endpoint
entry.content: Hey, did you get any solution for your issue. If yes, kindly share

entry.title: Re: Smooth Transition Ahead: SAP Enable Now Migration from SAP BTP Neo to SAP BTP, Kyma runtime
entry.content: Will the migration be any different if a client has switched to SCIM for authentication before then? Do the comments under "Single Sign-On (SSO) Adjustments" above still apply?

entry.title: FP_VT3: Update scheduling rule on the provider contract
entry.content:
How can we update the field "Scheduling" (DFKK_VT_I-INV_SCHEDULE) on the provider contract level instead of contract account level? The field is available on tab 'Items: Convergent Invoicing'. 
Scheduling characteristic is defined in the CI system and we are able to update it in Contract account level but we could not find a way to update it on provider contract while created solution quotation ->subscription contract-Provider contract flow. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: FP_VT3: Update scheduling rule on the provider contract
entry.content:
SAP does not support the field in standard. It is not available on the UI or via API. 
The field is available at the interface structure CRM_ISX_CONTRACT_ITEM from SOM to FI-CA (function module CRM_ISX_CONTRACT_MAINTAIN. To fill the field 'Scheduling' use one of the methods MAP_CREATE (creating a provider contract) or MAP_CHANGE (change a provider contract) of the BAdI (enhancement spot) CRM_ISX_ERP_CONTRACT.

entry.title: Re: Vectorize your Data : SAP HANA Cloud's Vector Engine for Unified Data Excellence
entry.content:
Hi @ashoo_pal ,

To create the vector embeddings, we currently use 3rd party models like for example text-embedding-ada-002.

All the best,

Susen
